title: That Silly Squirrel
description: A modpack for fun, adventure, RPG, magic, skills and more...
body:
# That Silly Squirrel

## Designed for fun, magic, exploration, adventure, RPG.

> We designed a perfect modpack for the most amazing rehaul of minecraft to bring players more fun and creativity, vanilla minecraft will always have a place in our hearts but modding the game to bring their creative dreams alive!

- From designing amazing create machines in your super base to exploring the re-beautified dimensions of The Nether & End.
- Explore the magical lands of Terralith, find easter eggs from old tv shows, fun american national parks and much more.
- Choose your playstyle with Origins, define your characteristics and builds around your personality.
- Magical adventures with Simply Skills and Paladins & Priests and Wizardry, Rogues and more!
- Lot of more decorative and block choices to choose from with Every Compat & Chipped!
- Beware of the Illagers lurking in every corner of the map.

Some of the main mods included in the pack are:
- [Amethyst Imbuement](https://modrinth.com/mod/amethyst-imbuement) & Content based from this mod
- [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) & many more from fzzyhmstrs.
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) & additions
- Better End & Better Nether
- Terralith
- [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped)
- [Every Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/every-compat)
- Farmers Delight & many additions
- [Just Outdoor Stuff](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-outdoor-stuffs)
- Lets Do Vinery, Bakery & Compat
- [Illager Invasion](https://modrinth.com/mod/illager-invasion)

For a full list of the mods included please see the latest version or head over to our website where we have dedicated a page to all the mods in our pack.

Some updates to the modpack may remove certain mods, we test all of the mods on our server and gather feedback from the players involved. If a mod you like does get removed, please contact us on discord and we will consider putting it back into play.

_Mods included in this pack do not belong to me, they belong to their respective owners who allow the use of modpacking with their content, we thank them for all their hard work and time making wonderful additions to minecraft._
